# Tax required in invoice

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:c1cc19646db367fa71a4876b56f36591eaace17b69f4d6782c3de8e699f979c0
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a check on invoice
to force user to set tax on invoice line.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to Invoicing > Customers > Invoices.
2. Create a new invoice.
3. Insert a new invoice line without taxes.
4. Press on "Post".
5. An error will raise preventing to do it.
